finding: Alexander polynomial root spacings show GUE-class level repulsion

precision_immunity.Megethos_mediation: immune — spacing is scale-free after normalization
precision_immunity.trivial_baseline: immune — no target variable to match on
precision_immunity.F35: immune — not a cross-domain transfer claim

connection: If confirmed with clean root computation, this bridges knot TOPOLOGY to random matrix theory — the same universality class as L-function zeros (Montgomery-Odlyzko). A second entrance to GUE from a completely different mathematical domain.
caveat: Skewness and kurtosis are elevated above pure GUE. May indicate intermediate universality class, finite-size effects from short polynomials (6 roots avg), or normalization artifacts. Need: (1) higher-degree Alexander polynomials, (2) comparison to GOE and GSE, (3) clean root computation without z-scored coefficients.
